contentPattern.structure: per slide: client logos + 'Case Study' label + headline + description paragraph + results list + image; prev/next navigation and indicators

suitableFor: rotating case-study / proof-point carousels on ad landing pages
slide sets combining a headline, description, bulleted results and an image with prev/next controls
customer-story galleries on a brand-colored card
notSuitableFor: simple photo + quote testimonial carousels (use carousel-testimonials)
